meaning: n.滤波器,过滤器,滤光器,筛选vt.过滤,渗透,用过滤法除去vi.滤过,渗入,(消息等)走漏,慢慢传开
examples: A new filter can save on energy bills.
A filter will remove most impurities found in water.
Put the coffee in the filter and let the water run through.
If you like art, but hate children, you can filter them out and vice versa.
